'''Cather Taan''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] owner of [[Cather Taan's Gun Shop]] in [[Storrd Township]] on [[Seregar]]. He was stocky and heavy-set.

Given enough time, he could often acquire just about any type of weapon imaginable. He was not known to trade or bargain. His prices to buy or repair items were high, but he considered his inventory and skills worth the cost.
